text:
特訓って言うからには
命がけで挑まなくっちゃ
ダメだと思うんだよねー。

しかも今回のはスゴイやつだから
終わる頃にはフラフラに
なっちゃってるかも……

なにしろ相手は機甲種２０体！
次から次へと仕留めていかないと
追いつかないと思うよー！

しーっかり呼吸を合わせて
くれぐれも無駄撃ちしないようにね

So I was thinking, yeah? And I realized the
only way to really step up your training is if
we put your very life on the line.

So that's why I made sure this one is going to
be a real doozy. I wanna see those legs of
yours quaking when you get back.

What's the plan, you ask? Well! I want you to
take down twenty automata! And you're
gonna have to be quick about it if you
wanna keep up, too!

Remember, breath, focus, and don't waste
a shot!
